name: PMA
comment: PM-1 .pma assembly (docs/formats.md). Mnemonics mirror pm1_syntax() in crates/post-machine/src/asm/mod.rs; the drift guard in crates/post-machine/tests/editor_grammar.rs asserts coverage generated from that table. Mnemonic alternation is ordered longest-first so a `.s` short form (e.g. `jm.s`) is never shadowed by its bare prefix (`jm`) under Oniguruma's first-match alternation. `local` after `.func` is scoped keyword.control, same as every other keyword-tier word in this grammar. Labels use the pragmatic ASCII class `[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*` for highlighting even though the parser additionally accepts Unicode letters (docs/formats.md) — best-effort, not a full identifier class.
